column2: # Widen the canvas: labels on left, plot in center, annotations on right
x_label   <- -0.42   # left edge for study labels
# Separator line between studies and pooled
aes(x = ci_lo, xend = ci_hi, y = y, yend = y),
annotate("text", x = x_label, y = x_hdr_y, label = "Study",
annotate("text", x = x_label, y = 2, label = "Common effect model",
annotate("text", x = x_label, y = 1, label = "Random effects model",
annotate("text", x = x_ci, y = x_hdr_y, label = "Beta [95% CI]",
annotate("text", x = x_wt, y = x_hdr_y, label = "Weight",
name   = "Beta (HbA1c change per C allele copy)",
